overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking across an expansive airport tarmac surrounded by industrial hangars and distant snow-capped mountains. The character walks forward across the open concrete expanse before turning left toward the large hangar buildings under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airport tarmac with distant mountain range

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the expansive concrete tarmac away from the camera toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: mountain range with snow visible on peaks forming the backdrop of the scene
sparse green trees dotting the horizon line on the left side
low industrial building visible in the distance directly ahead
expansive flat gray concrete surface covering the airport apron

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a vast open airport tarmac under a clear blue sky. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distant center while scattered trees line the horizon. The concrete surface stretches empty in all directions with a distant hangar building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching industrial hangar buildings on airport grounds

events.description: character executes a left turn and begins walking toward the large hangar buildings on the west side of the tarmac

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large gray hangar buildings after turning left, approaching the industrial structures

entered.detail: large industrial aircraft hangar with gray concrete walls and flat roof
low warehouse structure with reddish roof visible beyond the main hangar

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the character walks toward the large gray industrial hangars that dominate the left side of the frame. The snow-capped mountains shift to the right background as the camera follows the character's new westward trajectory across the tarmac toward the warehouse buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast airport tarmac that shifts from an open expanse toward a cluster of industrial hangars. It begins with the character walking forward under a clear blue sky, with snow-capped mountains centered in the far distance and scattered trees lining the horizon. As the character turns left, the perspective pivots, causing the distant mountains to shift toward the right background. The scene then expands to reveal large gray industrial hangars dominating the left side of the frame as the camera follows the new westward trajectory. Finally, the movement carries the character across the empty concrete surface directly toward the looming warehouse buildings.
